events.title: EC archives of the week

items.title: EC archives of the week (21-27/06) Telemessage: "Enlargement of the European Community to Ten Members" (21/06/1971, 55 years ago) Florence European Council (21-22/06/1996, 30 years ago) First World Congress against the death penalty: speech by Robert Badinter, former French Minister for Justice (21/06/2001, 25 years ago) Luxembourg National Day (23/06) United Kingdom European Union membership referendum (23/06/2016, 10 years ago) Corfu European Council, with the signature ceremony of the accession acts to the European Union of Austria, Sweden, and Finland (24-25/06/1994, 32 years ago) Slovenia Statehood Day and Croatia National Day (25/06) First meeting of the Laeken group on the future of Europe with Jean-Luc Dehaene, Jacques Delors, Giuliano Amato, Bronisław Geremek and David Miliband, and chaired by Guy Verhofstadt, Belgian Prime Minister (26/06/2001, 25 years ago) The Hague European Council (26-27/06/1986, 40 years ago) SME Day (27/06) Signature of the partnership agreement between the EC and Denmark and Greenland (27/06/2006, 20 years ago)

items.title: EP Plenary Session Voting session
items.summary: Voting session Vote on request for urgent procedure (Rule 170) Proposal for a regulation of the European Parliament and of the Council amending Regulation (EU) 2021/1232 as regards the extension of its period of application Decision requesting the Authority for European Political Parties and European Political Foundations to verify whether Europe of Sovereign Nations Party complies with the conditions laid down in Article 3(1), points (d) and (e), of Regulation (EU, Euratom) 2025/2445 Amending the decision of 18 December 2024 on setting up a special committee on the Housing Crisis in the European Union, extending its term of office and adjusting its responsibilities Mario Furore (JURI A10-0190/2026) - Request for the waiver of the immunity of Klára Dobrev Temporary support and payment of advances regarding the increased fertiliser prices due to the Middle East crisis Elissavet Vozemberg-Vrionidi (TRAN A10-0174/2026) - International road passenger transport services by coach and bus in the border regions: cabotage operations between Austria and Switzerland Andrzej Halicki (BUDG A10-0180/2026) - Draft amending budget no 1/2026: entering the surplus of the financial year 2025 Lucia Yar (BUDG A10-0179/2026) - Mobilisation of the European Globalisation Adjustment Fund: Application EGF/2026/000 TA 2026 - Technical assistance at the initiative of the Commission Bogdan Rzońca (BUDG A10-0178/2026) - Mobilisation of the European Union Solidarity Fund: assistance to Romania, Cyprus and Spain with regard to natural disasters in 2025 Stéphanie Yon-Courtin (ECON A10-0171/2026) - Competition policy – annual report 2025 Matthias Ecke (ECON A10-0169/2026) - A coherent tax framework for the EU’s financial sector Marcos Ros Sempere (CULT A10-0173/2026) - A new strategy for media literacy and digital learning Lukas Mandl, Pierfrancesco Maran (DEVE/ENVI A10-0187/2026) - Implementation and delivery of the Sustainable Development Goals in view of the 2026 High-Level Political Forum Johan Van Overtveldt (ECON A10-0186/2026) - Digital assets – challenges for the competitiveness and integrity of the European Union’s financial system Texts on which debate is closed
